blocks.content: When you download em3k, you'll find a simple, organized structure that makes it easy to customize and deploy your own lessons.
At the root level, you'll find:
index.html - The entry point of the application
config.json - Global configuration file for the entire app
assets/ - Contains all the app code, styles, and resources
lessons/ - Where you create and store your lesson content
The lessons folder can contain multiple lesson collections. Each lesson lives in its own subfolder with all its content, quizzes, and assets self-contained.
